ExportArtifact.description: Grants permission to export artifacts from Amazon Q Developer

ImportArtifact.description: Grants permission to import artifacts to Amazon Q Developer

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list all tags associated with an Amazon Q Developer resource

StartAgentSession.description: Grants permission to start an agent session with Amazon Q Developer

TagResource.description: Grants permission to associate tags with an Amazon Q Developer resource

TransformCode.description: Grants permission to transform code with Amazon Q Developer Transform Agent

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags associated with an Amazon Q Developer resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the Amazon Q Developer resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
